PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lael Brown, via zoom, for Maxine Collins, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the status of the real property and counsel confirms that no one lives on the property and that notice has been provided to the decedent's children.

After additional discussion, there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Maxine Collins is appointed Administrator with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-10-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.
